trace_target.label: Story 2.2 — Implement scripts/build-licenses.mjs generator + Sage Round-1 architectural addendum

sources: _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md §3.1 (FR-02 row) + §4 (FR-02 constraints) + §5 ADR-008 step 1 'Schema reference' subsection (Story 2.2 amendment)
projects/deepnest-next/reviews/2-2-implement-scripts-build-licenses-mjs-generator-script-round-1.md (Sage Round-1 consolidated report — DEE-93 APPROVED severity.max=P2)

requirements.title: scripts/build-licenses.mjs is Node-stable, zero-dep, single-file generator

tests.title: git ls-tree 74a795f -- scripts/build-licenses.mjs returns one entry; 298 LOC; imports limited to node:fs, node:path, node:url (verified by reading file head); ADR-008 cross-link in header comment; mirrors scripts/check-test-fixtures.mjs shape per AC-02.2.1
git diff db6592b..74a795f -- package-lock.json returns empty; package.json dependencies/devDependencies unchanged (no YAML library, no transitive add) — Sage Round-1 pre-flight + Murat re-verified
package.json build.files contains '!{examples,helper_scripts,scripts}' (verified at 74a795f) — generator auto-excluded from packaged Electron installer per ADR-008 §5 step 5

requirements.title: npm run licenses:build regenerates LICENSES.md deterministically

tests.title: package.json scripts.licenses:build = 'node scripts/build-licenses.mjs' (verified at 74a795f) per AC-02.2.2
Sage Round-1 pre-flight: two consecutive 'node scripts/build-licenses.mjs' runs produce byte-identical LICENSES.md (cmp exit 0; git status --short LICENSES.md clean after second run)
Sage pre-flight: LICENSES.md is LF-only (32 lines, single trailing \n, no CRLF — head -c 200 | od -c, tail -c 5 | od -c)

Generator LICENSE_YML_FILES walk order matches spec: main/LICENSE.yml → main/util/LICENSE.yml → main/font/LICENSE.yml → tests/assets/LICENSE.yml; first-party block emitted in walk + insertion order, third-party block ASCII-sorted by Unit

requirements.title: npm run licenses:check regenerates in-memory and diffs against committed LICENSES.md (Story 2.3 input)

tests.title: package.json scripts.licenses:check = 'node scripts/build-licenses.mjs --check' (verified at 74a795f)
package.json scripts.test at 74a795f reads 'npm run test:fixtures:check && playwright test' — licenses:check NOT in the chain (correct per AC-02.2.3 — Story 2.3 / A4 wires the gate, not this story)

Sage Round-1 pre-flight: temporary LICENSES.md mutation triggers --check exit 1 with unified-diff-style stderr ('L33 expected: <empty> observed: X'); restoration triggers exit 0 — round-trip confirmed
Sage Round-1 pre-flight: 'time node scripts/build-licenses.mjs --check' real 0m0.064s — < 1 s budget per architecture.md §3.3; mirrors scripts/check-test-fixtures.mjs precedent

requirements.title: Byte-for-byte regression — git diff origin/main -- LICENSES.md reduces to exactly the §2.6 + §2.7 deltas

tests.title: Murat re-verified: git diff db6592b..74a795f -- LICENSES.md shows 4 line replacements: rows 3 (GPLv3→GPL-3.0-only), 4 (Boost→BSL-1.0), 5 (Boost→BSL-1.0) AND row 6 = latolatinfonts.css insertion in first-party block; row 12 (third-party block) deletion. All other 24 rows + header + table-shape byte-identical to db6592b. AC-02.2.4 byte-equivalence (modulo §2.6 + §2.7) holds verbatim.

LICENSES.md at 74a795f has 28 data rows (6 first-party + 22 third-party) — total unchanged from Story 2.1 baseline (was 5 first-party + 23 third-party); latolatinfonts.css moved up one block, third-party shrinks by 1, first-party grows by 1

Every entry across 4 LICENSE.yml files (5 + 14 + 7 + 2 = 28) appears exactly once in LICENSES.md table; latolatinfonts.css (first_party: true) renders into first-party block at row 6; all other entries route via default folder-relative Unit derivation

requirements.title: In-installer-but-out-of-tree first-party rows emitted by generator (closes Sage Round-1 P2-01)

tests.title: main/LICENSE.yml created at 74a795f (43 lines per --stat) with 5 entries (/main, /main/svgparser.js, /main/deepnest.js, minkowski.cc, minkowski.h, /polygon); each entry: first_party: true, SPDX-canonical license, copyright + upstream_url. §2a option (a) chosen per Amelia's Completion Notes; passthrough path uses literal Unit-column value (documented in main/LICENSE.yml header + ADR-008 §5 step 1 amendment).

Sage Round-1 pre-flight: rows 1–6 of LICENSES.md table at 74a795f read /main, /main/svgparser.js, /main/deepnest.js, minkowski.cc, minkowski.h, /polygon, /main/font/latolatinfonts.css (verbatim spec ordering)

Boost-licensed minkowski.cc, minkowski.h + /polygon rows present (§2.5 non-negotiable anchor — @deepnest/calculate-nfp ships under node_modules/ in unpacked Electron installer per build.files: ['**/*'] no-asar; Boost requires attribution to appear in all copies). ADR-008 §5 step 1 amendment names main/LICENSE.yml as the explicit passthrough mechanism.

requirements.title: SPDX normalisation — Boost → BSL-1.0 ×2; GPLv3 → GPL-3.0-only ×1 (closes Sage Round-1 P3-01)

tests.title: git diff db6592b..74a795f -- LICENSES.md: row 3 /main/deepnest.js License cell GPLv3 → GPL-3.0-only; row 4 minkowski.cc, minkowski.h Boost → BSL-1.0; row 5 /polygon Boost → BSL-1.0. Third-party SPDX cells unchanged (Sage pre-flight).
main/LICENSE.yml entries declare license values BSL-1.0 / GPL-3.0-only / MIT directly (verified by reading file at 74a795f); SPDX-canonical from authoring (no post-hoc normalisation pass needed)
BSL-1.0 + GPL-3.0-only both valid per SPDX 2.3 §10.1 (Sage pre-flight cross-checked) — already validated for third-party rows in Story 2.1 trace; this story extends validation to first-party block

requirements.title: first_party: true schema flag drives first-party-block placement (closes Sage Round-1 P3-02 — latolatinfonts.css)

tests.title: main/font/LICENSE.yml at 74a795f: latolatinfonts.css entry contains 'first_party: true' field (verified by reading file); upstream_url set to repo URL; existing notes preserved
Sage Round-1 pre-flight: row 6 of LICENSES.md at 74a795f is /main/font/latolatinfonts.css (first-party block); was row 12 of third-party block at db6592b — moved per AC-02.2.7 expected ordering
Third-party block at 74a795f has 22 rows (was 23 at db6592b); first-party block has 6 rows (was 5 at db6592b); total 28 rows unchanged
Generator's emitter recognises optional first_party: true field; entries with the flag render into first-party block regardless of source folder (header comment documents the routing)

requirements.title: Schema canonicalisation + per-folder LICENSE.yml header reduction (closes Sage Round-1 P3-03)

tests.title: architecture.md §5 ADR-008 step 1 amended at 74a795f with 'Schema reference' subsection: field-by-field table for path/name/license/copyright/upstream_url (required) + notes/first_party (optional). 14 lines added per --stat. Option (α) chosen per Amelia's Completion Notes.

All 4 LICENSE.yml headers reduced: main/LICENSE.yml = 3 lines (post-fixup commit 16c81b8 closed AC-02.2.8 round-1 self-finding by trimming from > 3 to 3); main/util/LICENSE.yml = 3 lines; main/font/LICENSE.yml = 4 lines (per-file context preserved per AC-02.2.8 Constraint clause); tests/assets/LICENSE.yml = 4 lines (fixture-integrity reminder preserved); each header includes 'Schema: see _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md §5 ADR-008 step 1' + '# Line endings: LF only.'
All 4 LICENSE.yml files preserve '# Line endings: LF only.' line per AC-02.2.8 Constraint (verified by reading file heads at 74a795f)

Story file Completion Notes List: '§2.9 fixture-manifest interaction — (β) with implementation deferred. Documented in PR description; scripts/check-test-fixtures.mjs and tests/assets/.fixture-manifest.json are NOT modified by this PR (zero-touch).' Decision visible in story file at 74a795f.
git diff db6592b..74a795f -- scripts/check-test-fixtures.mjs returns empty — Story 2.2 itself does not modify the fixture-integrity gate (Murat re-verified)

Round-2 fixup commit f40843f regenerated tests/assets/.fixture-manifest.json after AC-02.2.8 LICENSE.yml header reduction (size 2016 → 1340; sha256 2f56bb04... → 7d17b55564dff212a38c0d311d70fcf7bd05849887ce315aa756bcda93b4b891). Mechanical regen via 'npm run test:fixtures:update'; FR-02/FR-03 coupling exactly per AC-02.2.9 warning. Disclosed in story file File List + Change Log.

sprint-status.yaml at 74a795f: '2-2-implement-scripts-build-licenses-mjs-generator-script: done' (DS commit; CS-side ready-for-dev flip already done in commit f710308). Both file-header '# last_updated:' comment + YAML body 'last_updated:' line refreshed to mention DEE-92 (DS done). Matches Story 2.1 PR #20 closer pattern.

requirements.title: npm test green within NFR-01 ±20% wall-clock band

tests.title: Playwright Electron Nest spec (Config → Import → Sheet → Nest → Export). Spec unchanged in this story (zero diff vs db6592b).

CI run 24961417841 (PR #23, head f40843f, 'Playwright Tests' job): 'Run Playwright tests' step 2026-04-26T16:27:28Z → 16:27:45Z = 17000 ms ∈ NFR-01 ±20% band [13397, 20096] ms; Δ vs rolling_mean_ms 16746.6 = +253.4 ms (well within tolerance). Job conclusion: success.

CI run 24961493231 (push-to-main, 74a795f squash-merged, 'Playwright Tests' job): 'Run Playwright tests' step 2026-04-26T16:31:09Z → 16:31:26Z = 17000 ms ∈ NFR-01 ±20% band [13397, 20096] ms; Δ = +253.4 ms — second independent confirmation. Job conclusion: success.

Story 3.1 fixture-integrity gate (npm run test:fixtures:check) green at 74a795f after f40843f manifest fixup — both CI runs (24961417841, 24961493231) report 'success' overall conclusion (gate is part of the 'npm test' chain via test:fixtures:check && playwright test)

PR #23 description carries the §16 audit grid (16/16 self-claim). Story file Completion Notes: '§16 anti-pattern audit. 16/16 pass. Generator is .mjs outside main/, ADR-007 strict-TS surface unchanged...'

Sage Round-1 pre-flight independently re-ran §16 hot greps against the diff: no window. adds (§16.1), no IPC channel (§16.2/3), no edits under main/util/*.{js,ts} (§16.5), no _unused/ source edits or imports (§16.6), no @ts-ignore (§16.8), no --no-verify (§16.9), no svg drop/re-encode (§16.10), no eslint.config.mjs change (§16.15). 16/16 PASS.
git log db6592b..74a795f --pretty=fuller shows authors Josef Fröhle / Amelia / Paperclip; no [skipped] markers, no --no-verify usage. §16.9 hold.

requirements.title: No fixture/asset/vendored-source file renamed, re-encoded, or content-changed (FR-03 invariant guard + scope-creep foreclosure)

tests.title: git diff --stat db6592b..74a795f lists exactly: LICENSES.md, _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/2-2-...generator-script.md (new), _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.yaml, _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md, main/LICENSE.yml (new), main/font/LICENSE.yml, main/util/LICENSE.yml, package.json, scripts/build-licenses.mjs (new), tests/assets/.fixture-manifest.json (round-2 fixup), tests/assets/LICENSE.yml. 11 files, 834+/77- per --stat. Matches AC-02.2.13 scope (manifest fixup disclosed under AC-02.2.9).

git diff db6592b..74a795f -- 'main/util/*.js' 'main/util/*.ts' 'main/util/_unused/*' 'tests/assets/*.svg' 'tests/assets/*.woff*' 'main/font/fonts/*' eslint.config.mjs tsconfig.json '.github/' scripts/check-test-fixtures.mjs returns empty (Murat re-verified). FR-03 invariant + §16.5 + §16.6 + §16.10 hold.
git diff db6592b..74a795f -- package-lock.json returns empty (Murat re-verified) — zero-dep guarantee from AC-02.2.1 holds at the lockfile layer

recommendations.action: Track Sage Round-1 P2/P3 follow-ups via DEE-98 (10 bundled findings: 4×P2 + 6×P3). Bundle 1 (Vitra ADR alignment), Bundle 2 (Lydia parser test harness — natural surface of Story 2.3 / A4 scope-add), Bundle 3 (Hermes wall-clock CI guard for licenses:check on Story 2.3 / A4). None blocks Story 2.2 gate.

Story 2.3 (A4) inherits the wire-in-into-scripts.test action item; consume Story 2.2's licenses:check as the canonical drift gate. The 750 ms wall-clock CI guard for licenses:check itself (Hermes P3-06) becomes a Story 2.3 acceptance criterion.
Re-trace at Story 2.3 merge — that trace becomes the release-gate input for the FR-02 epic close-out (per Story 2.1 trace's 'Long-term Actions' guidance).
